list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM runs ORDER BY started_at DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND status = 'ok'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND status = 'ok'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='ok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS REAL) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='ok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS REAL) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM reproduction_attempts WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM reproduction_attempts WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', updated_at) AS time, status, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY status ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' ORDER BY updated_at
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', updated_at) AS time, status, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY status ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' ORDER BY updated_at

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT fat_image_tag AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND fat_image_tag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fat_image_tag ORDER BY value DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT fat_image_tag AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND fat_image_tag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fat_image_tag ORDER BY value DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(reason, 1, 80) AS reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND status != 'ok' AND reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY substr(reason, 1, 80) ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(reason, 1, 80) AS reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' AND status != 'ok' AND reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY substr(reason, 1, 80) ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
